name: Joni"a"s Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-inch spring form pan and dust with graham cracker crumbs.
2. In a bowl, sift cottage cheese and add softened cream cheese; beat until well blended and creamy.
3. Add sugar, then eggs; reduce speed and beat in corn starch, lemon juice, and vanilla until well blended.
4. Stir in melted butter or margarine and sour cream until smooth.
5. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for about 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until firm around the edges.
7. Turn off the oven; let the cake stay in the oven for 2 hours.
8. Remove from the oven and cool completely on a wire rack. Chill before removing the side of the pan.
Good luck and enjoy your cheesecake!
